Class SyntaxErrorReporter

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.BaseErrorListener
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.parsing.SyntaxErrorReporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
ANTLRErrorListener
public class SyntaxErrorReporter extends BaseErrorListener
An ANTLR4 error listener that stores the errors internally. You can disable the additional printing of message on the logger logger flag.

It supports beautiful error message via SyntaxErrorReporter.SyntaxError.getBeatifulErrorMessage(String[]).
